nasb.text: Belshazzar the king held a great feast for a thousand of his nobles, and he was drinking wine in the presence of the thousand.

esv.text: King Belshazzar made a great feast for a thousand of his lords and drank wine in front of the thousand.

cnv.text: 伯沙撒王為他的一千大臣大擺筵席，他和他們一同喝酒。

ccb.text: 伯沙撒王盛宴款待一千大臣，与他们一同饮酒。
